name: mcp-sec
description: Reference implementation: MCP with cryptographically verified human approval (Phase 0 scaffold).

scripts.build:all: npm run build:lib && npm run build:shared
scripts.dev: npm run build:all && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.test: npm run build:all && npm --workspace server test
